indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: High ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can reduce noise and provide a sense of openness.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and productivity.

reasoning_summary: The space is large and open, with high ceilings and natural light, making it suitable for solo computer work.
